title: 007 First Light
desc: Earn the Number. 007 First Light is a thrilling espionage action-adventure game from IO Interactive. Follow James Bond as a young, resourceful, and sometimes reckless recruit in MI6's training programme, and discover an origin story of the world’s most famous spy.

title: Enigmatic Worlds
desc: Explore strange and abstract worlds filled with equally unusual but deadly beings of many types. Enigmatic Worlds is an FPS inspired by obscure retro-styled FPS games and Amiga games.

title: Schrödinger's Call
desc: I am Mary. The last person in the world you'll ever talk to. Schrodinger's Call" is an adventure game that uses a mysterious phone to connect with souls who cannot die. The main character, Mary, wakes up in a strange room with no memory. The player, along with the bewildered Mary, will save souls.

title: Starminer
desc:
Design and build an interstellar mining fleet to strip space of its invaluable minerals, and sell them for a tidy profit. But beware. Your greed will attract the alien. Use warships and defense platforms to protect your fleet at all costs - in real space, in real time.

Starminer is a space industry and logistics simulation that strives to be at the forefront of space strategy gaming, blending cutting-edge rendering technologies with deep tactical and creative gameplay. It's set against backdrops of fully-realized 3D environments, where the beauty of space becomes an integral part of player immersion, setting Starminer apart as a visually stunning and technologically advanced space base-building game. Starminer is built with realism and immersion as core design pillars through the incorporation of Newtonian physics for propulsion and movement. This not only adds a layer of authenticity and complexity to the gameplay but also introduces a rewarding learning curve for players seeking a genuinely advanced spacefaring experience.

In Starminer, the universe is more than just a pretty backdrop for exploration and conquest—it's a playground for players to explore their creativity and long-term ambitions for their fleets. Central to the game's creative ethos is the ability to design a variety of space stations that bring them toward their goals; whether it's to mine resources, be a defensive power, colonization, energy production, or something else entirely. The dynamic and customizable nature of these different types of stations means that the player doesn’t only decide what their cosmic empire will be; it will become a unique reflection of their strategic prowess and imaginative flair.

title: Néro & Sci ∫ Integral Edition
desc: In Néro & Sci, players explore a poetic world inspired by mathematics, where shapes, colors, and symbols form the backdrop of a unique adventure. Through the original “White Dimension” mechanic, they uncover a simplified version of the world that reveals new solutions to puzzles.

title: Tootum
desc: Tootum is a charming pixel art metroidvania game that immerses players in a magical world full of mysteries. With magic-based combat, a wide variety of items, and an engaging narrative, Tootum offers a rich experience in exploration and discovery.

title: Voidface
desc: Face off in a challenging bullet-hell arena shooter to try and clear bite-sized boss rush challenges. Learn to dodge their attacks, cast spells to gain an upper hand, and kill everything that gets in your way.

title: Coreward
desc: Coreward is an incremental game where you use shields to protect yourself from incoming enemies and use their remains to become more powerful.

title: Sydless
desc: Sydless is an ultra-fast movement shooter where your weapon is a chaotic ball that grows deadlier the more you move.

title: TBH: Task Bar Hero
desc: The taskbar is now the stage for our heroes! Support their small but epic adventures. Earn chests through their journeys and unlock powerful gear to strengthen your heroes!

title: Your Weight
desc: Your Weight is a simulation game that turns weight loss into a series of decision-based scenarios. Players manage their character's journey through weight loss by making lifestyle choices, with game mechanics centered around health and fitness decisions that affect the character's progress toward their goal.

title: Birdwatching Notebook
desc: Build cozy birdwatching spots on balconies, docks, cliffs, rainforests, or deserts, and wait for lovely birds to visit. A gentle desktop idle game—like tiny postcards on your screen, where beautiful scenes and cute birds accompany your quiet moments.

title: Echo Generation 2
desc: Embark on a sci-fi deckbuilding RPG odyssey. Gather your crew, craft powerful decks, and battle across the stars to find your way home. Deal the cards. Defy the cosmos. Embrace the adventure.

title: Stranded Survivors
desc: Survive swarms of monsters, rescue stranded animals, and build a base where they can be safe in this unique bullet heaven. Turn your rescues into upgrades and build a safe town to create new weapons and recruit powerful heroes that unlock new ways to survive til dawn.

title: Orbital
desc: Explore the cosmos, discover new worlds, and seed life across the stars in ORBITAL, a relaxing 2D space exploration and colony sim. Guide the growth of your civilizations through rich, narrative-driven events where your choices shape their future. A cozy journey to the farthest reaches of space.

title: System Overload
desc: SYSTEM STATUS: UNSTABLE> System Overload is a resource management sim disguised as a Win95/98 Task Manager. Balance CPU, RAM, and heat while fighting malware across 8 unique endings. Push your hardware to the limit—just don't trigger a meltdown. >DO_NOT_CRASH.

title: Nocturne for Cyl-Hestia
desc: Play as a memorialist and investigate a dystopian city in this 3D adventure game. Collect memories, unlock visions, hack encrypted data, and expose the truth in the face of a regime that manipulates memory.

title: Fix and Clerk
desc: You work for a device company and your job is to verify paperwork of customers before handing their repaired device to them. Check, interrogate and confirm their identity. Beware of scammers in disguise coming to claim devices that are not theirs.

title: Grumpy Jack
desc: A bullethell adventure awaits! Join Jack, a reluctant hero, as he battles bizarre enemies, uncovers secrets, meets quirky characters—and hunts down Death’s missing coffee mug.

title: BarrelBots
desc: A multilayered grid-based puzzle game featuring small robots that carry and stack Barrels of nuclear waste.

title: Hamster Talk
desc: Hamster Talk is an idle social game that fits naturally into your day. Interact with lively hamsters on your screen, enjoy their cute reactions with a touch, visit friends’ towns, and have light chats with players around the world—all while your hamsters keep you company.

title: Nitro City Racing
desc: Dodge traffic and maintain top speed on your mission to become the ultimate street racer!

title: Nomnomia
desc: Consume enemies to steal their abilities and survive by replenishing your constantly draining HP. Fight for survival on the mysterious planet Nomnomia in this food-chain action shooter.

title: Regeneration Engine
desc: Fall into the engine and try to fight your way back up to the surface in this turn-based RPG. As your companions die, consume their essences to grow stronger. Explore a strange underground world with your party, battle creatures roaming the dark, and discover the mystery behind the apocalypse.

title: Ravenswatch: Song of Thieves
desc: No description available

title: Pioneers of Pagonia: Meadowsong
desc: Experience the story of the island Meadowsong. Once known for their thriving agriculture, the harvest of Meadowsong is haunted by a mysterious Withering destroying everything. Build new production chains with fruits, wine and livestock and help to solve the mystery of the witches' coven!

title: My Music Label
desc: My Music Label is a music management and simulation game where you take full control of your label. Discover young talents, manage legendary artists, and shape the evolution of the music industry. Every decision influences careers and music history.

title: Janitorial Escapism
desc: You play as one of the Cleaners/Maintenance team members at the Black Mesa Research Facility. After the resonance cascade occurs, you are forced to make you way to the surface and escape.
